cta_box_text: Seasonal Pay What You Can Mini's don't happen often, but when they do, their spots sell out quickly! Get in touch with me to be the first to know about the next time minis are available.
hero_bg_alt: Beautiful field of purple lupine flowers blooming in the White Mountains of New Hampshire
cta_box_title: Want to secure a spot for the next round of minis?
header_intro:
Captured in 15 minute increments from May through November these limited edition sessions celebrate the changing seasons of New Hampshire in their purest form. 

These sessions are specifically pay what you can, allowing everyone the opportunity to have professional images in their home.
